lines.speaker: Wemund
lines.text: What can I interest you in? Need any pipes? I make very sturdy pipes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not really... what kind of shop is this anyway?

lines.speaker: Wemund
lines.text: Why, it's Wemund's Wrench Warehouse. Wemund, that's me.

lines.speaker: Wemund
lines.text: I don't really sell just wrenches, you know, I sell anything related to the maintenance of dwarven steam machines.

lines.speaker: Wemund
lines.text: Sometimes I do repair work as well. Or I send my assistant.

lines.speaker: Wemund
lines.text: Oh, he's right over there... used to work in the mines to the south, poor lad. Made a bit of a mess of things I believe.

lines.speaker: Wemund
lines.text: So what'll it be then? Got any ship engines to repair?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, but I don't think your services are required.
